author: elliotxx
description: A minimalist text-based todo manager (Text-Based GTD) for efficient task management.

manifest.author: elliotxx
manifest.description: A minimalist text-based todo manager (Text-Based GTD) for efficient task management.
manifest.name: Simple Todo

name: Simple Todo

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### 🐛 Bug Fixes
- fix: invalid setting switch
- fix: improve directory type checking in archive function
- fix: plugin name and description

### 💄 Styles
- style: remove unused code
- style: use sentence case on i18n
- style: change to english comment

### ♻️ Refactor
- refactor: get locale from obsidian setting
- refactor: add preview changes and confirm to i18n

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/elliotxx/obsidian-simple-todo/compare/0.2.6...0.2.7
